title: 무서울 것 같아요

goal.ko: -(으)ㄹ 것 같아요·-(으)ㄴ 것 같아요로 추측해서 말할 수 있어요!
goal.en: I can guess and say what I think using -(으)ㄹ 것 같아요 and -(으)ㄴ 것 같아요!

key_points: -(으)ㄹ 것 같아요 — 아직 안 일어난 일 추측 (I think it will be...)
-(으)ㄴ 것 같아요 — 지금 상태 추측 (It seems to be...)

sections.title: -(으)ㄹ 것 같아요
sections.subtitle: Guessing about something not certain yet
sections.description: Use -(으)ㄹ 것 같아요 to guess about something that hasn't happened yet or that you're not 100% sure of — like 'I think it will be scary' before you've even tried it.

rule_boxes.label: 🔵 받침 없으면 → -ㄹ 것 같아요
examples: 오다 → 올 것 같아요 (I think it'll come/happen)
크다 → 클 것 같아요 (I think it'll be big)

rule_boxes.label: ✅ 받침 있으면 → -을 것 같아요
examples: 있다 → 있을 것 같아요 (할 수 있을 것 같아요 = I think I can do it)

rule_boxes.label: ⚠️ ㅂ 불규칙 조심! · 무섭다 → 무서울 것 같아요
examples: 무섭다 → 무서우 + ㄹ 것 같아요 = 무서울 것 같아요

examples.korean: 저도 잘 할 수 있을 것 같아요.
examples.english: I think I can do well too.

examples.korean: 진짜 할 수 있을 것 같아?
examples.english: Do you really think you can do it?

sections.title: -(으)ㄴ 것 같아요
sections.subtitle: Guessing about the current state
sections.description: Use -(으)ㄴ 것 같아요 to guess about how something IS right now — like noticing someone already looks scared. Remember 형용사 + -(으)ㄴ + 명사 from Episode 5 (덜 익은 과일)? Same pattern, now with 것 같아요!

rule_boxes.label: ✅ 받침 있으면 → -은 것 같아요
examples: 무섭다 → 무서우 + ㄴ 것 같아요 = 무서운 것 같아요 (ㅂ 불규칙)

rule_boxes.label: 💡 -(으)ㄹ 것 같아요 vs -(으)ㄴ 것 같아요
examples: 지금 상태 → -(으)ㄴ (seems to be, right now)

examples.english: Kayo already seems scared, doesn't he?
It seems better than I thought!

lines.speaker: 엄마
lines.text: 우워~ 저기 좀 봐. 너무 무서울 것 같아.
lines.en: Whoa~ Look over there. It looks so scary.

lines.speaker: 리암
lines.text: 괜찮을 거예요. 제가 옆에서 지켜 드릴게요.
lines.en: It'll be okay. I'll be right beside you and protect you.

lines.speaker: 엄마
lines.en: Kayo already seems scared, doesn't he?

dialogue_practice.scene: 💪 진짜 할 수 있을 것 같아?
dialogue_practice.scene_en: Do you really think you can do it?

lines.speaker: 카요
lines.text: 아니에요! 저도 이번엔 잘 할 수 있을 것 같아요.
lines.en: No! I think I can do well this time too.

lines.speaker: 리암
lines.text: 카요, 진짜 할 수 있을 것 같아?
lines.en: Kayo, do you really think you can do it?

lines.speaker: 카요
lines.en: Bro~ It seems better than I thought!

fill_items.en: Kayo already seems scared, doesn't he?
I think I can do well this time too.
It seems better than I thought!
Do you really think you can do it?

choices.en: Kayo looks like he's having fun

listen_quiz.audio: 저도 이번엔 잘 할 수 있을 것 같아요.

choices.en: Kayo doesn't want to do it

step1_chunks.english: I'll protect you right beside you.
step1_chunks.hint: 지켜 드리다 = protect for you (ep07 복습!)

step1_chunks.sentence: 진짜 할 수 있을 것 같아?
step1_chunks.english: Do you really think you can do it?
step1_chunks.hint: -(으)ㄹ 수 있을 것 같아요 = I think I can...

chunks.en: do you think you can do it?

step2_words.sentence: 저도 이번엔 잘 할 수 있을 것 같아요.
step2_words.english: I think I can do well this time too.
It seems better than I thought.

write_items.question: 😱 이 놀이기구, 아직 안 탔는데 느낌이 어때요?
write_items.question_en: You haven't ridden this yet — how do you guess it'll be?
write_items.answer_en: It seems like it'll be scary.

write_items.question: 😊 다 타고 나서 기분이 어때요?
write_items.question_en: After riding it, how do you feel?
write_items.answer_en: It seems better than I thought.

lines.en: Do you think this will be scary?

lines.kr: 네, 좀 무서울 것 같아요. 근데 재미있을 것 같기도 해요.
lines.en: Yeah, it seems a bit scary. But it also seems like it'll be fun.

lines.kr: 이 음식 어때 보여? 맛있을 것 같아?
lines.en: How does this food look? Does it seem tasty?

lines.kr: 음... 맛있는 것 같아요! 한번 먹어볼게요.
lines.en: Hmm... it seems tasty! I'll try it.

self_check.ko: -(으)ㄹ 것 같아요로 아직 안 일어난 일을 추측할 수 있어요.
self_check.en: I can guess about something not certain yet using -(으)ㄹ 것 같아요.

self_check.ko: -(으)ㄴ 것 같아요로 지금 상태를 추측할 수 있어요.
self_check.en: I can guess about the current state using -(으)ㄴ 것 같아요.
I know the irregular forms of 무섭다 (무서워요/무서운).
I know 괜찮다 and 지켜 주다.
